pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the perfect plan for your business. Flexible pricing options for teams of all sizes.
pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subheadline: Choose the perfect plan for your business. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for small teams and startups
pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq2Q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq2A: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.
pricing.faq3A: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
pricing.faq4A: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with our service.
pricing.ctaSubheadline: Our team is here to help you choose the right plan for your business.
